Happy Tails

Every story began with an animal who needed safety, care, and a second chance. These are the happy endings your support helped make possible. Select any story to read more.

Peace4Paws

All-volunteer 501(c)(3) dog rescue serving Northern New Jersey since 2007. We are not a shelter. We find homes, one dog at a time.

217 Center Avenue, Westwood, NJ 07675
(201) 280-8696 · compassion@peace4paws.org
